race.comment: Open race to close out the card. FRAGILE LOVE (5) is on the doorstep of another victory with consecutive runner-up finishes either side of the spell and gets a bunch of weight off with the 3kg claim. Will be better with that first-up effort now under the belt and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. MELDUBIOUS (11) has a win and a second from three spins around this circuit and maps ideally for this from gate two. Rates among the leading contenders. BEREZKA (9) has placed four of five over this track and trip and hails from the leading Maher stable. Top-three credentials on best figures. SHELSTEIN (6) brings NSW formlines to the table and can run a big race while fresh. NEPRAVDA (7) best of the rest despite the sticky draw.
